summary.zh-CN: Google 同时提供个人免费的 Gemini Code Assist、Google AI Plus / Pro / Ultra 个人订阅，以及组织版 Standard / Enterprise；其中官方仅明确 Pro / Ultra 会提升 Code Assist / CLI 日请求上限。
summary.en-US: Google offers free Gemini Code Assist for individuals, Google AI Plus / Pro / Ultra personal subscriptions, and Standard / Enterprise organization editions; only Pro and Ultra are explicitly documented as raising Code Assist / CLI daily request limits.

notes.zh-CN: 个人订阅与组织版并存；Code Assist / CLI 的日请求上限以 quotas 页为准，个人价格与附加权益以订阅页为准。Google AI Plus 当前不是官方单列的 Code Assist 提额路径。
notes.en-US: Personal subscriptions and organization editions coexist. Daily Code Assist / CLI limits should follow the quotas page, while personal pricing and bundled benefits follow the subscriptions page. Google AI Plus is not currently a separately published Code Assist uplift path.

limits.zh-CN: Gemini Code Assist agent mode 与 Gemini CLI 合计 1000 requests / 用户 / 日
limits.en-US: 1000 requests per user per day shared across Gemini Code Assist agent mode and Gemini CLI

access.zh-CN: IDE 代码补全与生成、对话助手、agentic chat、Gemini CLI 配额、smart actions
access.en-US: IDE completions and generation, conversational assistant, agentic chat, Gemini CLI quota, and smart actions

notes.zh-CN: 官方 FAQ 说明个人免费版面向 personal Google Account，不适用于 Google Workspace 账号。
notes.en-US: The official FAQ says the free individual edition is for personal Google Accounts, not Google Workspace accounts.

limits.zh-CN: Code Assist 官方 quotas 页未将 AI Plus 列为更高日请求上限购买路径；未单独公布 Code Assist / CLI 提升额度
limits.en-US: The official Code Assist quotas page does not list AI Plus as a higher daily-limit purchase path and does not publish a separate Code Assist / CLI uplift for it

access.zh-CN: 增强版 Gemini app、200 monthly AI credits、200 GB 存储、Gemini in Gmail / Vids / Chrome 等个人权益

notes.zh-CN: Gemini subscriptions 页展示的个人订阅档；当前更偏向通用 AI 权益，不是官方单列的 Code Assist 编码升级档。
notes.en-US: A personal subscription tier shown on the Gemini subscriptions page; it is positioned more as a general AI bundle than as a separately published Code Assist coding tier.

limits.zh-CN: Gemini Code Assist agent mode 与 Gemini CLI 合计 1500 requests / 用户 / 日
limits.en-US: 1500 requests per user per day shared across Gemini Code Assist agent mode and Gemini CLI

notes.zh-CN: Gemini subscriptions 页明确列出 Google AI Pro 包含更高的 Gemini Code Assist / CLI 日请求上限。

limits.en-US: 2000 requests per user per day shared across Gemini Code Assist agent mode and Gemini CLI

access.en-US: Includes everything in Google AI Pro with the highest Code Assist / CLI / Jules limits, 25000 monthly AI credits, 30 TB storage, YouTube Premium individual, and other bundled benefits

limits.en-US: 1500 requests per user per day shared across Gemini Code Assist agent mode and Gemini CLI

summary.zh-CN: Kimi 官方会员体系覆盖 Agent、Kimi Code、Kimi Claw 与专业数据库等能力，按个人订阅分为五档。
summary.en-US: Kimi's official membership lineup covers Agent, Kimi Code, Kimi Claw, and professional database access across five individual subscription tiers.

notes.zh-CN: 支持连续包月与连续包年；当前页面公开了月付价，包年可享更大折扣，最高立省 ¥1,680。
notes.en-US: Supports recurring monthly and annual subscriptions. The current page publicly shows monthly prices, while annual billing offers larger discounts with savings up to CNY 1,680.

limits.zh-CN: Agent 用量约 30 个，单任务并行；Kimi Code 1 倍额度；专业数据库 1000 次调用。
limits.en-US: About 30 Agent runs, single-task concurrency, 1x Kimi Code quota, and 1,000 professional database calls.

access.zh-CN: 支持 Agent 优先生成队列、Office 文件处理、深度研究与发布带数据库网站。
access.en-US: Includes Agent priority generation, Office file handling, deep research, and database-backed website publishing.

notes.zh-CN: 连续包年更优惠。
notes.en-US: Annual billing is discounted.

limits.zh-CN: Agent 用量约 60 个，2 个任务并行；Kimi Code 4 倍额度；专业数据库 2000 次调用。
limits.en-US: About 60 Agent runs, 2 concurrent tasks, 4x Kimi Code quota, and 2,000 professional database calls.

access.zh-CN: 支持 Agent 优先生成队列、Office 文件处理、深度研究与发布带数据库网站。
access.en-US: Includes Agent priority generation, Office file handling, deep research, and database-backed website publishing.

notes.zh-CN: 连续包年更优惠。
notes.en-US: Annual billing is discounted.

limits.zh-CN: Agent 用量约 150 个，2 个任务并行；Agent 集群可用 50 次、4 个子任务；Kimi Code 20 倍额度；专业数据库 5000 次调用。
limits.en-US: About 150 Agent runs, 2 concurrent tasks, 50 Agent cluster runs with 4 subtasks, 20x Kimi Code quota, and 5,000 professional database calls.

access.zh-CN: 额外包含 Kimi Claw、Kimi Claw 安卓端与桌面端、10 个 Kimi Claw 群聊，并支持发布带数据库网站。
access.en-US: Also includes Kimi Claw, Kimi Claw on Android and desktop, 10 Kimi Claw group chats, and database-backed website publishing.

notes.zh-CN: 连续包年更优惠。
notes.en-US: Annual billing is discounted.

limits.zh-CN: Agent 用量约 360 个，4 个任务并行；Agent 集群可用 120 次、4 个子任务；Kimi Code 60 倍额度；专业数据库 12000 次调用。
limits.en-US: About 360 Agent runs, 4 concurrent tasks, 120 Agent cluster runs with 4 subtasks, 60x Kimi Code quota, and 12,000 professional database calls.

access.zh-CN: 包含 Kimi Claw、Kimi Claw 安卓端与桌面端、10 个 Kimi Claw 群聊，并支持发布带数据库网站。
access.en-US: Includes Kimi Claw, Kimi Claw on Android and desktop, 10 Kimi Claw group chats, and database-backed website publishing.

notes.zh-CN: 连续包年更优惠，最高立省 ¥1,680。
notes.en-US: Annual billing is discounted, with savings up to CNY 1,680.

summary.zh-CN: MiniMax 官方 Token Plan 订阅，覆盖标准版与极速版，可用于编码及多模态工作流。
summary.en-US: MiniMax Token Plan subscriptions covering standard and high-speed tiers for coding and multimodal workflows.

notes.zh-CN: 提供标准版与极速版两类订阅，均支持月付与年付；年付与对应月付方案的能力额度相同。
notes.en-US: Offers standard and high-speed subscriptions in both monthly and annual billing, with the same usage limits across billing cadences for matching tiers.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7 每 5 小时 600 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.zh-CN: 标准版月付。
notes.en-US: Monthly standard tier.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7 每 5 小时 1,500 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Speech 2.8 每日 4,000 字、image-01 每日 50 张、Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes 4,000 Speech 2.8 characters per day, 50 image-01 generations per day, and up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.zh-CN: 标准版月付。
notes.en-US: Monthly standard tier.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7 每 5 小时 4,500 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Speech 2.8 每日 11,000 字、image-01 每日 120 张、Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s 每日 2 个、Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s 每日 2 个、Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes 11,000 Speech 2.8 characters per day, 120 image-01 generations per day, 2 Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s generations per day, 2 Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s generations per day, and up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.zh-CN: 标准版月付。
notes.en-US: Monthly standard tier.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7-highspeed 每 5 小时 1,500 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Speech 2.8 每日 9,000 字、image-01 每日 100 张、Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes 9,000 Speech 2.8 characters per day, 100 image-01 generations per day, and up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.zh-CN: 极速版月付。
notes.en-US: Monthly high-speed tier.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7-highspeed 每 5 小时 4,500 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Speech 2.8 每日 19,000 字、image-01 每日 200 张、Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s 每日 3 个、Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s 每日 3 个、Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes 19,000 Speech 2.8 characters per day, 200 image-01 generations per day, 3 Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s generations per day, 3 Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s generations per day, and up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.zh-CN: 极速版月付。
notes.en-US: Monthly high-speed tier.

limits.zh-CN: M2.7-highspeed 每 5 小时 30,000 次请求。

access.zh-CN: 含 Speech 2.8 每日 50,000 字、image-01 每日 800 张、Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s 每日 5 个、Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s 每日 5 个、Music-2.6 每日 100 首限免。
access.en-US: Includes 50,000 Speech 2.8 characters per day, 800 image-01 generations per day, 5 Hailuo-2.3-Fast 768P 6s generations per day, 5 Hailuo-2.3 768P 6s generations per day, and up to 100 free Music-2.6 tracks per day.

notes.en-US: Monthly high-speed tier.
